title: Security audit: Wallet access, PSBT policy, signer auth, and release gates
scope: Wallet access sessions and signer authentication
PSBT spending policy validation and proposal transaction lifecycle enforcement
Ledger and Trezor hardware signer authentication and signing adapters
Supabase RLS, service-role-only RPCs, and branch database security tests
CI/release gates, production configuration checks, and audit publication artifacts
publicSummary: Security audit by GPT-5.5 covering wallet access sessions, signer authentication, PSBT policy validation, Supabase RLS/RPC boundaries, hardware signer adapters, and release gates. Found zero critical/high/medium findings. One low finding related to the expanded service-role Edge Function boundary, mitigated by authentication, session, challenge, vault-access, PSBT-policy, and RPC-grant checks. Four informational findings. No release blocker.

publication.summary: This report covers wallet access, signer authentication, PSBT policy, Supabase RLS/RPC boundaries, and release gate details only. It does not disclose secrets, private user data, descriptors, xpub sets, PSBT base64, UTXO arrays, seed material, private keys, OTP mailbox credentials, service-role keys, or operational tokens.
